reviews.review_description: This game is fun especially with friends! But I think I annoy staff lol 😅, I recommend this game if your feeling bored and wanna good around with friends. I’ve had great experiences in this game so don’t miss out :)

Hey yall! I’m the owner here (Nightman) and I hope you guys like the game! The game will have weekly updates with many bug fixes to come. If you ever see any bad people or bugs, join the discord and we can help you out!
I love this game so much I have so much fun
This game is SO AMAZING that I can play with all sorts of games in Forest, Zero - G, And More! So Download The Game PLZ
I love the horror and other stuff but one problem is that the movement or the colliders are broken overall good game I recommend it
wun uv du best gaimz eva!!!!1!1!1!1!1!11!

It an amazing game the maps the cosmetics fan art and the staff / beta testers room is funny with their own voice lines but the reason it’s not a 5 is because it hard to join public’s and movement system is a little wacky but overall it’s good

I'm a small YouTuber and tiktoker and I support this game this game is amazing it's fun and I would recommend it 



Also owner if you're reading this could I get mod or content creator DM me if you can ples 

Love your game

reviews.review_title: Good work night man an other devs
reviews.review_description: This game is soo good for only being out for 2 days keep up the good work nightman 10/10 would definitely recommend ￼
I am writing this to say that this game is great everything about it is awesome I love all the cosmetics and the playerbase too everyone is very nice
I love this game I play it all day

reviews.review_title: About the game and my opinion about it!
reviews.review_description:
So first this game is a really good game. I really like the glass bridge and PVP! Now about the game, this game has glass bridges, PVP, Parkour, Zero G, Mountains, Shop, and Horror is coming soon! The movement it little buggy but nightman is try his best to fix it. You reduce the bug movement by turning off the mirror in lobby and shop, also turn off the leaderboard in lobby and mountains. Try this game for your self and explore. Enjoy the game, get your friend to download this game! Have fun monkers!😊(Also join the discord and your share Ideas)

https://discord.gg/rMzRXbvSdY
